c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and reach.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Company Reports

c.d: The variety of methods available for sending messages, such as SMS, MMS, or in-app messaging.
The maximum number of recipients that can be included in a single broadcast or group message.
The operating systems and devices on which the app is available (e.g., iOS, Android, Web).
The presence of security measures like end-to-end encryption to protect user data and communications.
The pricing structure of the app, including free tiers, subscription plans, or one-time purchases.
c.s: Official App Documentation, App Store Listings

c.d: The ability of the app to integrate with other services or platforms, enhancing its functionality.
Feedback from users regarding their experience with the app, indicating satisfaction and reliability.
The simplicity and intuitiveness of the app's interface and user experience.
The quality and availability of support provided to users for troubleshooting and assistance.
